creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
x11/cinnamon has a build error after the recent gobject-introspection update to 1.50.0 (tested on 10-stable)

.
.
libtool: link: cc -o /usr/ports/x11/cinnamon/work/Cinnamon-2.4.6/src/tmp-introspectjBovci/Gvc-1.0 -I/include -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fstack-protector tmp-introspectjBovci/usr/ports/x11/cinnamon/work/Cinnamon-2.4.6/src/tmp-introspectjBovci/Gvc-1.0.o -Wl,--export-dynamic -pthread -Wl,--export-dynamic  -L/usr/local/lib -L. ./.libs/libgvc.a -lpulse-mainloop-glib -lpulse -lpthread -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lgmodule-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lintl -pthread
gvc/gvc-mixer-stream.c:135: Warning: Gvc: invalid "transfer" annotation for guint32: only valid for array, struct, union, boxed, object and interface types
gvc/gvc-mixer-stream.c:423: Warning: Gvc: invalid "transfer" annotation for guint32: only valid for array, struct, union, boxed, object and interface types
<unknown>:: Fatal: Gvc: warnings configured as fatal
<unknown>:: Fatal: Gvc: warnings configured as fatal

gmake[5]: *** [/usr/local/share/gobject-introspection-1.0/Makefile.introspection:156: Gvc-1.0.gir] Error 1
.
.
